nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_meta_service crate implementing gRPC service handlers for the meta node.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Guide for meta service backup and recovery operations including snapshot procedures, restore commands, and known caveats.

nodes.name: worker.rs
nodes.summary: ConnectorSourceWorker background task that polls connector enumerators for new splits and manages split assignments to streaming fragments.

nodes.name: assignment.rs
nodes.summary: Core actor assignment logic for streaming graph fragments, computing optimal placement of actors across compute nodes with vnode balancing and reschedule support.
nodes.languageNotes: The largest file in this batch at 2842 lines, implementing the full actor assignment algorithm including parallel unit allocation and scaling.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_object_store crate providing a unified object storage interface over S3, GCS, Azure, and local storage.

nodes.name: build.rs
nodes.summary: Cargo build script that compiles all RisingWave proto definitions into Rust code using prost-build with custom serialization and service generation.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_pb crate containing generated Protobuf types for all RisingWave gRPC services.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_prost_helpers crate providing utility extensions for generated Protobuf types.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the prost helpers crate explaining the code generation approach for extending generated proto types with custom methods.

nodes.name: generate.rs
nodes.summary: Code generator for prost helper method implementations, producing trait implementations and utility functions for generated Protobuf structs.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for prost helpers, re-exporting code generation utilities and providing macros for Protobuf type extension.

nodes.name: id.rs
nodes.summary: Strongly-typed ID wrapper implementations for all RisingWave entity IDs (TableId, FragmentId, ActorId, etc.) built on Protobuf primitive types.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: Library root for the generated Protobuf crate, re-exporting all generated types and ID wrappers used across RisingWave components.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Source directory overview describing the RisingWave crate structure, component responsibilities, and inter-crate dependency relationships.

nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risedev-config binary providing interactive configuration management for the RisingWave developer tool.

nodes.name: main.rs
nodes.summary: Interactive risedev configuration tool that manages developer environment profile settings with a TUI for component selection.

nodes.name: download_adbc_snowflake_driver.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that downloads and installs the ADBC Snowflake driver for local development and testing of Snowflake connector features.

nodes.name: risedev-dev.rs
nodes.summary: Main entry point for the risedev development tool that orchestrates starting, stopping, and managing all RisingWave components in a local dev environment.

nodes.name: risedev-docslt.rs
nodes.summary: Tool for extracting and running SQL logic tests (SLTs) embedded in Rust doc comments throughout the codebase.

nodes.name: grafana_gen.rs
nodes.summary: Generator for Grafana datasource and dashboard provisioning configuration files for the RisingWave dev environment.

nodes.name: prometheus_gen.rs
nodes.summary: Generator for Prometheus scrape configuration targeting RisingWave component metrics endpoints in the dev environment.

nodes.name: tempo_gen.rs
nodes.summary: Generator for Grafana Tempo distributed tracing configuration used in the RisingWave dev environment.

nodes.name: dollar_expander.rs
nodes.summary: Config expander that resolves dollar-sign variable substitutions in risedev YAML configuration files.

nodes.name: id_expander.rs
nodes.summary: Config expander that generates unique component IDs for each service instance in risedev YAML configurations.

nodes.name: provide_expander.rs
nodes.summary: Config expander that resolves service dependency references in risedev YAML configurations using the provide/use mechanism.

nodes.name: ConnectorSourceWorker
nodes.summary: Background worker managing a single connector source's split discovery, running periodic tick operations to detect new partitions and update assignments.

nodes.name: ConnectorSourceWorkerHandle
nodes.summary: Handle to a ConnectorSourceWorker providing command interface for force ticking, dropping fragments, finishing backfill, and updating connector properties.

nodes.name: create_source_worker
nodes.summary: Creates and starts a ConnectorSourceWorker for a new source, establishing the connector enumerator and spawning the background task.

nodes.name: create_source_worker_async
nodes.summary: Asynchronously creates a ConnectorSourceWorker allowing non-blocking initialization for sources that require async setup.
